title: White Plastic Board with Pen Set, 4 Pieces (29.5cm x 22.5cm) - Durable, Perfect for Instant Notes, Memos, & More
features: COMPLETE SET FOR IMMEDIATE USE: Each pack includes a durable metal-backed whiteboard, a whiteboard marker with an attached eraser for convenience, and two 2cm diameter round magnets. Start organizing your thoughts and tasks right out of the box.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS: Crafted from high-grade plastic, our whiteboard is built to last. The durable materials ensure it withstands regular use, offering a reliable platform for your creative and organizational needs.

EASY TO CLEAN & MAINTAIN: The smooth surface of the whiteboard allows for effortless writing, erasing, and re-writing. Simply use a dry cloth or whiteboard eraser to keep your board clean and ready for new ideas at all times.

VERSATILE & MULTIPURPOSE: Whether you're tracking daily to-dos, leaving messages for family members, or plotting out project milestones, this whiteboard set is up to the task. Its versatility makes it an indispensable tool in any setting.
COMPACT & HANDY SIZE: Measuring 29.5cm x 22.5cm, this whiteboard fits comfortably in various spaces, from office cubicles to kitchen walls, making it versatile for personal and professional use.
description: Use this board and pen for any events that can be reused for the next season.
